description.value: You can speak with and befriend animals with ease. In addition, you treat Knowledge (nature) as a class skill. Granted Powers Speak with Animals (Sp): You can speak with animals, as per the spell, for a number of rounds per day equal to 3 + your cleric level. Animal Companion (Ex): At 4th level, you gain the service of an animal companion. Your effective druid level for this animal companion is equal to your cleric level â 3. ( Druids who take this ability through their nature bond class feature use their druid level â 3 to determine the abilities of their animal companions ).
